title: ode45
summary: Solve nonstiff ODE systems using adaptive Dormand-Prince 5(4) integration.

gpu_support.notes: The adaptive integrator runs on the host. RHS callback functions may still call GPU-aware builtins.

description: `ode45` integrates nonstiff first-order ODE systems over `tspan` using adaptive RK45 stepping and returns MATLAB-compatible time/state outputs.
behaviors: Supports scalar, vector, and matrix-valued initial conditions.
Accepts options as a struct, including `RelTol`, `AbsTol`, `InitialStep`, and `MaxStep`.
When `tspan` has more than two points, the solver returns values at each requested time.
With one output, returns only the `y` trajectory matrix.
